title: rabdosia japonica
intro: Rabdosia japonica, also known as Tanakapillow or Japanese Tanaka's licorice root, is a type of plant species in the Lamiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate blood circulation and expel pathogens. The health benefits of Rabdosia japonica include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. Rabdosia japonica can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, or tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
